## Week in Review: 2026-04-20 to 2026-04-26

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 5.0.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 1.7 (-14.3% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 1.7 (-7.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.35)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.3 (+28.6% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.29)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 5.0 (-18.6% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.14)
